CustomField.description: Opens a view where you can send "RTV Submitted, Ineligible Response - No External Report" emails to ten applicants at a time who are ineligible due to mortgage pre-approval related issues.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opens a view where you can send "RTV Submitted, Ineligible Response - No External Report" emails to ten applicants at a time who are ineligible due to mortgage pre-approval related issues.
CustomField.label: Send MPA Removal Emails, O
